Notify.PolygonNeedsPoints: Add at least three polygon points before creating an elevation region.
Notify.ShapeTooSmall: Draw a larger shape before creating an elevation region.

Keybindings.ToggleParallaxOverlayHint: Temporarily force parallax strength to Off on this client. Press again to restore the configured setting.

Settings.ClientEnabledHint: Client-only. Disable all Scene Elevation visuals and automation on this browser for performance or motion sensitivity. World settings and other users are unchanged.
Settings.ShowElevatedGridHint: Client-only. Override System Grid replaces Foundry's grid with elevation-aware grids. Interaction overlay only shows shifted grids while interacting. Use System Grid leaves Foundry's native grid unchanged.
Settings.ResetDefaultsHint: Set the module elevation defaults to the recommended visual profile.
Settings.ResetDefaultsConfirm: Reset module elevation settings to the recommended defaults? This updates the world-level module settings; scene overrides are not removed.
Settings.PresetHint: Apply a tested combination of parallax, transition, overlay, shadow, and depth settings.
Settings.ParallaxHint: Optional viewer-based motion for elevated overlays and transition texture. Off keeps overlays and transition textures stationary.
Settings.ParallaxHeightContrastHint: Controls how much parallax differs by elevation. Reduced keeps depth differences gentle; Normal gives lower, farther elevations more drift and higher, nearer elevations less drift; stronger levels exaggerate that separation.
Settings.ParallaxModeHint: How elevated overlays react to camera or pointer movement. Includes camera-origin, velocity drift, orthographic, multi-layer, axis-only, mouse, fade/zoom, and shadow-only modes.
Settings.PerspectivePointHint: Anchor used by parallax and responsive shadows. Scene anchors keep one shared direction; far anchors sit one scene width or height outside the map; Region anchors place the point on each Region; Point on scene edge uses a draggable handle in Elevation select mode; Furthest and nearest edge follow the camera center.
Settings.TransitionModeHint: Texture and shadow treatment at Region boundaries, used to read the edge between elevation layers.
Settings.BlendModeHint: Texture and shadow treatment at Region boundaries, used to read the edge between elevation layers.
Settings.EdgeStretchPercentHint: How much of the overlay texture inside each boundary is wrapped and stretched down over the transition edge.
Settings.DepthScaleHint: How strongly perceived height scales with elevation. Compressed (default) keeps the legacy soft curve. Linear makes elevation 4 feel double elevation 2 and elevation 20 feel ten times elevation 2. Dramatic adds a super-linear boost for towering cliffs.
Settings.ElevationScaleHint: Multiplies visual elevation depth without changing token elevation values.
Settings.OverlayScaleHint: Scale elevated overlays as positive elevation increases, making higher layers feel closer to the viewport.
Settings.ShadowModeHint: How elevated region shadows choose their direction while panning.
Settings.ShadowLengthHint: How far cast shadows reach. Off disables them entirely; Extreme stretches them dramatically.
Settings.TokenElevationModeHint: Controls whether tokens automatically adopt elevation from Elevation Regions when they move.
Settings.TokenElevationAnimationMsHint: Duration in milliseconds for elevation-only token updates after movement settles. Lower values make up/down elevation changes complete faster without changing normal token movement speed.
Settings.TokenScaleHint: Tokens inside elevated regions appear slightly larger to reinforce the 3D illusion.
Settings.TokenScalingModeHint: Choose how elevation changes token scale.
Settings.TokenScaleMaxHint: Upper bound on the elevation-derived token scale factor.
Settings.TokenScalePerElevationHint: Amount added to the token's base scale per elevation step. At 0.1, scale 1 becomes 1.1 at elevation 1, 1.2 at elevation 2, and 1.3 at elevation 3.
Settings.DrawSteelMovementTypeAnimationsHint: Draw Steel only. Animate flying tokens and show burrowing tokens with the module's movement-type visuals.
Settings.DrawSteelHandleMovementModesHint: Draw Steel only. Flying and burrowing tokens keep their current elevation when movement would otherwise pull them back toward the surface. Disable to use normal Scene Elevation behavior.

elevation.label: Elevation
elevation.hint: Flat elevation for this region. Non-zero elevations lift the map art inside the region as an overlay.

slope.label: Slope
slope.hint: Use a sloped elevation instead of one flat elevation for the whole region. The elevation delta is added in the slope direction and can be negative.

slopeHeight.label: Elevation delta
slopeHeight.hint: Amount added to Elevation at the far end of the slope. Use a negative value to slope downward.

slopeDirection.label: Slope direction
slopeDirection.hint: Direction toward Elevation plus the elevation delta. 0 points north/up, 90 east/right, 180 south/down, and 270 west/left.

overhead.label: Overhead
overhead.hint: Treat this region as overhead cover. Tokens inside stay underneath it, so this region does not change their elevation or elevation-based token scaling.

underOverheadMode.label: When Under Overhead
underOverheadMode.hint: Controls how this overhead overlay appears to a token owner while their token is inside it. GMs see it faded while any token is inside unless selecting a token under it.

shadowStrength.label: Shadow strength
shadowStrength.hint: Multiplier for this region's short contact shadow and soft drop shadow. Set to 0 to hide shadows from this region.

presetOverride.label: Preset
presetOverride.hint: Apply a tested combination of parallax, transition, overlay, shadow, and depth settings for this region.

parallaxStrengthOverride.label: Parallax strength
parallaxStrengthOverride.hint: Optional parallax strength for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level parallax strength.

parallaxModeOverride.label: Parallax type
parallaxModeOverride.hint: Optional parallax type for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level parallax type.

perspectivePointOverride.label: Perspective point
perspectivePointOverride.hint: Optional perspective anchor for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level perspective point.

overlayScaleOverride.label: Overlay scale
overlayScaleOverride.hint: Optional overlay scale strength for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level overlay scale.

shadowModeOverride.label: Shadow type
shadowModeOverride.hint: Optional shadow type for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level shadow type.

shadowLengthOverride.label: Shadow length
shadowLengthOverride.hint: Optional shadow length for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level shadow length.

parallaxHeightContrastOverride.label: Parallax height contrast
parallaxHeightContrastOverride.hint: Optional parallax height contrast for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level parallax height contrast.

blendModeOverride.label: Transition style
blendModeOverride.hint: Optional elevation transition style for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level transition style.

edgeStretchPercentOverride.label: Edge stretch percent
edgeStretchPercentOverride.hint: Optional texture-wrap source strip size for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level edge stretch percent.

depthScaleOverride.label: Depth scale
depthScaleOverride.hint: Optional depth scale for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level depth scale.

elevationScaleOverride.label: Elevation scale
elevationScaleOverride.hint: Optional visual elevation multiplier for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level elevation scale.

modifyTokenElevation.label: Modify token elevation
modifyTokenElevation.hint: When scene token elevation mode is Per Region, this region can set token elevation after movement. Tokens outside all Elevation regions reset to 0 after movement.

modifyTokenScaling.label: Modify token scaling
modifyTokenScaling.hint: Scale tokens inside this region based on its elevation.
